content.text:
Now I have a clear view of atom N:16 in the center of the image. Let me carefully identify all neighbor atoms connected to N:16.

From the image, I can see that atom N:16 (nitrogen, blue sphere) is directly bonded to:
- C:17 (carbon, orange sphere) - connected via a blue bond extending to the right
- C:15 (carbon, orange sphere) - connected via a blue bond extending downward-left
- N:13 (nitrogen, blue sphere) - connected via a blue bond extending to the left

I can confirm these are covalent bonds as they are shown as direct connections between the atoms.

The geomconf_index can be determined from the file name "geomconf_7726.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 7726.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 16 (N) are:
- Atom index 17, element C (carbon)
- Atom index 15, element C (carbon)  
- Atom index 13, element N (nitrogen)

And the geomconf_index is 7726.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 16, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
